goal: Build a tabletop bimanual reach scene with Unitree G1 humanoid: G1 standing in front of table, both hands reach to two cubes. Maps to GR00T sim-to-real bimanual demo. Realizes Phase 8 yrkesroll #1 (ML/RL persona). Asset: G1 from NVIDIA SimReady catalog.
thoughts: G1 = NVIDIA-shipped humanoid asset, available via import_robot(format='asset_library'). Anchored as fixed base (no locomotion in this canonical, just bimanual reach).
Tabletop scene: 1.5m × 0.6m table. G1 stands with hip at z=0.95 (G1 nominal hip height ~1.0m).
Two target cubes: Cube_left at table (-0.20, 0.30, 0.80), Cube_right at (+0.20, 0.30, 0.80).
setup_whole_body_control wraps the G1 articulation; doesn't yet exist as a tested handler — falls back to setup_pick_place_controller per arm if WBC unavailable.
Function-gate semantics: 1 cube each delivered to drop_left/drop_right would be ideal; for V0, accept either cube reaching the drop bin (cube_paths).
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0.40, 0.40], scale=[0.75, 0.30, 0.40])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

import_robot(file_path="G1", format="asset_library", dest_path="/World/G1")
teleport_prim(prim_path="/World/G1", position=[0, -0.20, 0.95])

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_left", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.20, 0.40, 0.835], size=0.05)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_right", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.20, 0.40, 0.835], size=0.05)
for cube in ["/World/Cube_left", "/World/Cube_right"]:
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=cube, schema_name=api)

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0, -0.45, 0.75], size=[0.30, 0.20, 0.15])

setup_whole_body_control(
    articulation_path="/World/G1",
    locomotion_policy="hover_g1_v1",
    arm_planner="pink_ik",
    robot_profile="g1",
)
extension_notes: First humanoid canonical. Requires NVIDIA G1 SimReady asset (available via import_robot asset_library). setup_whole_body_control handler may not be fully wired — fallback path uses setup_pick_place_controller per arm.
failure_modes: G1 asset path resolution — NVIDIA Nucleus may not be configured locally
setup_whole_body_control handler stub — may not invoke real WBC; cube delivery via individual arm IK as fallback
Bimanual coordination: cuRobo/WBC may not parallelize arms; one-arm-at-a-time fallback
G1 hand frame name conventions vary (left_hand vs L_hand_link); template may need name fixup
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-10; build 20/21 (G1 SimReady asset missing on local Nucleus); gate stable_fail (no controller engagement without WBC stub); patched-r-a-enum-fix

migration_deferred.details: Requires Unitree G1 humanoid USD from Nucleus (NVIDIA robot assets); not available locally
